name: EJBCA
description: EJBCA — open source certificate authority and PKI software by Keyfactor.

seo.title: EJBCA — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: EJBCA: EJBCA — open source certificate authority and PKI software by Keyfactor.

when_to_use: Open source CA deployment for enterprise PKI infrastructure
Device certificate issuance for IoT manufacturing pipelines
TLS cert automation for large-scale internal microservices
SCEP/EST protocol support for network device enrollment
RA integration for PKI delegation in distributed organizations

pros: Feature-rich open-source CA used in production
CA, VA, RA, OCSP, CMP, SCEP, EST covered
Scales to billions of certs at telcos and govts
cons: Steep learning curve and heavy Java stack
Enterprise features often pushed behind paid tier
review.verdict: The heavyweight open-source PKI; if you actually need CMP/EST, this is your tool.
review.best_for: Telecom, govtech, and IoT teams running serious public PKI.
review.not_for: Devs who just want short-lived internal mTLS certs.
